message:
feat(core): cell attribute extensions and pane split/resize infrastructure

Concurrent agent work — extends cell attribute model with new display
capabilities, adds grid column helpers, terminal engine input routing
stubs, and comprehensive pane split/resize/removal operations in the
layout system.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
